current.summary: Hooks empirical testing framework plan validated clean — all 28 checks, 27 canary phrases, 12 agents, 17 skills. Ready for implementation.

activeWork.description: Multi-pass validation of hooks behavior checklist plan. Session: fixed check count error (28 vs 36), recalculated automability math (22/4/1/1), verified all 27 canary phrases against actual files, confirmed template conformance. Final validation passed with zero blocking issues.
activeWork.progress: Plan COMPLETE and VALIDATED. Blocking issues: check count corrected (28), automability math fixed, all canary phrases verified. Non-blocking issues: Japanese prompt string noted, reactivation-deduplication intermediate step documented. Zero issues on final pass. Plan is production-ready.

recentDecisions: Plan check count: 28 total (Categories 1-9), not 36 as initially stated
Automability: 22 fully automatable + 4 semi-automatable + 1 slow + 1 manual = 28 total
All 27 canary phrases verified against actual loading-behavior.md file content
Template conformance: status taxonomy (Observed/Inconclusive/Not tested), platform-vs-model per-check, platform details fields required
Dogfooding: running 17 skills across 12 agents validates syllabo's cross-provider install flow simultaneously
Contribution template requirements: all captured and integrated into plan
nextSteps: DECISION: Execute testing framework now (install 17 skills × 12 agents, run 28 checks with logging), OR commit artifacts and defer to next session
If executing: configure test logging for machine-readable pass/fail per check across all agents
If deferring: commit plan document(s) to version control and reference in next handoff
Optional: run abbreviated validation on subset of agents first (4-5 free tier) before full run

context.notes: This plan is final and validated. The hooks empirical testing framework specification is complete and production-ready with zero outstanding issues. Validation included: check count verification against actual spec file, automability recalculation with corrected math, canary phrase verification (27/27 matched), and template conformance audit. The framework integrates syllabo dogfooding — running the benchmarks itself validates syllabo's core value prop (cross-provider content installation). Next session should either execute the framework or document the plan for later execution. If executing, ensure test environment has: (1) 12 target agents installed, (2) logging framework for 28 check results, (3) syllabo CLI + content libraries staged for import testing.
